title: Journey C Phase 5 — Harden Output (QA & HITL)
description: QA validation results across campaign assets and human-in-the-loop pending items count

qa_passes.description: Array of QA checks performed on campaign assets (all must be 'pass' to proceed to Phase 6)

check.description: Name of QA check (e.g., 'copy brand compliance', 'technical SEO', 'meta pixel firing', 'landing page load time')

status.description: QA check result. If any status='fail', workflow must pause and escalate

issues_found.description: Detailed list of issues if status='fail' (empty array if pass)

hitl_items_pending.description: Count of human-in-the-loop items pending approval in Mission Control (if >0, workflow pauses until cleared)

allOf.description: All QA checks must be 'pass' before proceeding to Phase 6
